/usr/bin/ar qc ../lib/libvehicleDynamics.a  CMakeFiles/vehicleDynamics.dir/src/vehicle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vehicleDynamics.dir/src/suspension.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vehicleDynamics.dir/src/dynamics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vehicleDynamics.dir/src/wheel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vehicleDynamics.dir/src/chassis.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib ../lib/libvehicleDynamics.a
